description: Machine-readable index of every module in the Themes Frappe app. Read this file FIRST before exploring the codebase — it tells you exactly where to look for any given concern.

themes.purpose: Frappe custom app for site-wide CSS theming (Web tokens → --nce-*) and Frappe Desk chrome theming (Desk tokens → native --*-color)

entry_points.hooks.py: Frappe app metadata, CSS/JS loading (nce_theme.css + nce_desk_theme.css + theme-swatch-picker), SPA routing, Apps screen entry, after_install
entry_points.api.py: Whitelisted API — Web: get_theme_editor(), get_base_theme_editor(), save_theme(), set_base_theme(), save_as_base_theme(), create_theme(), list_themes(), rename_theme(), delete_theme(), regenerate_theme_css(). Desk: mirrored get/save/set_base/create/list/rename/delete/regenerate with desk_ prefix. Legacy aliases: get_active_theme_editor, save_active_theme, set_active_theme, save_as_default (Web); get_active_desk_theme_editor, save_active_desk_theme, set_active_desk_theme (Desk).
entry_points.install.py: after_install hook: Site Theme Config + NCE Theme Default + NCE Desk Theme Default on fresh install
entry_points.init_theme.py: One-time init script: ensure NCE Theme Default exists and publish Web CSS. Run via bench execute.
entry_points.init_desk_theme.py: One-time init script: ensure NCE Desk Theme Default exists and publish Desk CSS. Run via bench execute.
entry_points.verify_fresh_install.py: Post-install verification script for theme + desk theme bootstrap
entry_points.patches/v1_0/migrate_theme_settings_to_n: Post-migrate patch: legacy Theme Settings → NCE Theme Default
entry_points.patches/v1_0/collapse_theme_versions_to_: Copy legacy Theme Version JSON onto NCE Theme.theme_json
entry_points.patches/v1_0/remove_legacy_theme_doctype: Drop Theme Version and Theme Settings from database
entry_points.patches/v1_0/add_base_desk_theme_field.p: Add base_desk_theme to Site Theme Config
entry_points.patches/v1_0/bootstrap_default_desk_them: Bootstrap NCE Desk Theme Default on migrate

utils.utils/theme_color_utils.py: Color math helpers: OKLCH shade generation, _effective_role_hex (gamma-aware 600 stop), shadow building, token maps (BORDER_RADIUS_MAP, SHADOW_DEFS, etc.). Keep in sync with frontend/src/utils/color-shades.ts
utils.utils/css_writer.py: Web CSS generation and publish: generate_css(), generate_site_css(), publish_theme(), TOKEN_FIELDS, ROLES, CURATED_SHADES. Paired with desk_css_writer.py — see module header.
utils.utils/desk_css_writer.py: Desk CSS generation and publish: generate_desk_css(), publish_desk_theme(), DESK_TOKEN_FIELDS. Paired with css_writer.py — see module header.
utils.utils/bundle_base_theme.py: bundle_base_theme_to_app() — write base_theme.json + default_theme.py for new installs
utils.utils/bundle_base_desk_theme.py: bundle_base_desk_theme_to_app() — write base_desk_theme.json + default_desk_theme.py for new installs
utils.utils/site_theme_config_helpers.py: Read/write Site Theme Config base_theme and base_desk_theme (includes legacy active_theme tolerance)
utils.utils/workspace_sync.py: Sync Themes workspace shortcuts after install/migrate
utils.data/base_theme.json: Bundled Web base theme payload (updated by save_as_base_theme)
utils.data/base_desk_theme.json: Bundled Desk base theme payload (updated by save_as_base_desk_theme)
utils.utils/default_theme.py: Default Web token payload for new NCE Theme installs
utils.utils/default_desk_theme.py: Default Desk token payload for new NCE Desk Theme installs

doctypes.themes/doctype/nce_theme/: Web theme registry: theme_name, slug, is_default, status, theme_json. on_update republishes when Active or site base.
doctypes.themes/doctype/nce_desk_theme/: Desk theme registry: same shape as NCE Theme; single Active enforced at save time.
doctypes.themes/doctype/site_theme_config/: Single: base_theme, base_desk_theme, css_hash; on_update publishes Web CSS.

static_files.public/css/: Generated theme CSS (nce_theme.css, nce_desk_theme.css) + sidecar .hash files for hooks cache-busting
static_files.public/dist/: ThemeSwatchPicker widget build output (committed: theme-swatch-picker.umd.js/css/es.js; rebuild with npm run build:widget in frontend/)
static_files.public/frontend/: Vue SPA build output (regenerated by Vite)

pages.themes/page/site_theme_switch/: Desk Page redirect → Site Theme Config form

tests.tests/test_css_snapshots.py: Golden-file regression tests for generate_css / generate_site_css / desk CSS output
tests.tests/test_color_math_parity.py: Python side of color-math parity vs frontend color-shades.ts
tests.tests/golden/: Committed golden CSS + hash sidecars and color_math_parity.json

frontend.purpose: Vue 3 SPA for Web and Desk theme configuration and preview

key_files.src/router.ts: Vue Router config — maps /themes/* paths to page components

pages.src/pages/ThemeSettingsPage.vue: Web theme configuration UI (tabbed: Colors, Typography, Layout, Advanced) — large god-component; token maps duplicated from css_writer.py
pages.src/pages/DeskThemeSettingsPage.vue: Desk chrome theme configuration UI — structural clone of Web editor

composables.src/composables/useTheme.ts: Loads site base Web theme via get_active_theme_editor API (legacy alias for get_base_theme_editor) and applies CSS vars
composables.src/composables/useDeskTheme.ts: Loads Active Desk theme via get_active_desk_theme_editor API and applies Desk CSS vars
composables.src/composables/useThemeDefaults.ts: Default theme color/typography values for editor seeding

components.src/components/BrandColorPicker.vue: Brand color picker with swatch presets
components.src/components/SwatchPicker.vue: Hex color swatch picker for theme editor
components.src/components/ThemeSwatchPicker.vue: Headless Vue wrapper — picks theme-{kind}-{role}-{shade} class strings. Agent: Vue hosts MUST pass :set-field/:get-field to reactive formData (not inject alone) or save will not persist — see docs/theme-swatch-picker.md §8.1

widget.src/widget/constants.ts: Roles, kinds, curated shades — mirrors css_writer.py (keep in sync comment)
widget.src/widget/theme-swatch-picker.css: Widget modal layout styles (backdrop z-index 10000 blocks host form)
widget.src/widget/blocked-dialog.ts: User-facing msgprint when Theme missing or Inactive (no modal open)
widget.src/widget/adapters/desk-adapter.ts: Frappe Desk frm integration — resolveNceThemeSlug (Link → slug), frm.set_value on pick
widget.src/widget/adapters/standalone-adapter.t: Plain DOM field integration (themeFieldEl value must be slug)
widget.vite.widget.config.js: Vite library build → themes/public/dist/ (gitignored; run npm run build:widget)

utilities.src/utils/color-shades.ts: OKLCH shade generation (11-stop scale) — keep in sync with theme_color_utils.py
utilities.tailwind.config.js: Maps Tailwind utilities to --nce-* CSS tokens

nce_events.desk: Page Panel form — Colours tab (page_panel.js) calls frappe.ui.themeSwatchPicker.open({ frm, themeField: 'theme', valueField }) for eight chrome slots: frame_bg_class, header_bg_class, footer_bg_class, col_header_bg_class, filter_bar_bg_class, row_bg_class, row_alt_bg_class, dialog_header_bg_class
nce_events.runtime: panel_page_v2 — panelChromeClasses.js resolves slots → theme-bg-* on PanelFloat, PanelTable, PanelTableFilterBar, PanelFormDialog (viewer dialog scoped to opening panel)

architecture_notes: Web theme uses CSS custom properties (--nce-*) injected as :root vars (base theme) plus [data-nce-theme="slug"] scoped blocks per Active theme — downstream apps consume via var() or data-nce-theme scoping
Desk theme uses native Frappe Desk CSS variables (--primary-color, --bg-color, etc.) emitted to :root from nce_desk_theme.css
Web and Desk CSS loaded site-wide via app_include_css in hooks.py (nce_theme.css + nce_desk_theme.css)
is_active semantics DIFFER intentionally: Web is_active == is_base (site base theme); Desk is_active == status=='Active' (single active enforced). Do NOT unify without product sign-off.
Vue SPA is served at /themes/* routes via www/themes.html
ThemeSwatchPicker Desk: themeField = NCE Theme Link doc name → resolveNceThemeSlug before data-nce-theme; empty/invalid theme → blocked-dialog, no modal
ThemeSwatchPicker while open: slug cached at open time; backdrop blocks host form (no watchThemeSlug)
theme-bg-* classes auto-pair foreground (color: var(--nce-*-fg)) — consumers should not hardcode theme-text-primary-fg on children inside a dynamic bg surface

ThemeSwatchPicker Vue embed: pass :set-field/:get-field to host formData — Desk uses frm.set_value via desk-adapter.ts; Vue wrapper does not. See docs/theme-swatch-picker.md §8.1. Page Panel chrome is Desk-only today.
Refactoring plan: plans/REFACTORING_PLAN.md — build tests/golden before consolidating duplicated token tables.
